This is a Next.js website for AMICIZIA, a family-run Italian restaurant in Saarlouis, Germany.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 16 with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Framer Motion for animations

## Design System
- Primary color: Bordeaux red (`#6B1024`)
- Accent: White (`#ffffff`)
- Background: White and Cream (`#FFF8F5`)
- Typography: Geist Sans
- Style: Clean, modern, minimalist with smooth animations

## Content Language
- All user-facing content is in German
- The restaurant name "AMICIZIA" means "friendship" in Italian

## Key Pages & Sections
- Hero with animated entrance
- About / Family story
- Menu with category filter
- Delivery & Pickup info
- Contact with Google Maps embed
- Footer with quick links
